g.text: 72+ countries, 1,000+ policies — three regimes do the load-bearing work.
— Brussels stamps the model class; Washington devolves; Beijing watermarks the output.
CONVERGENCE ON PRINCIPLE · DIVERGENCE ON IMPLEMENTATION
SOURCE ONETRUST APR 2026 · BRICS J.ECON · CMUACM REVIEW · INSIGHTS.UTU · POLICY SCANS OF 72+ JURISDICTIONS
